title: Input Data Completeness and Validation
description: All input data for RWA calculations must be complete, validated against schema, and missing or invalid data must be flagged and handled appropriately.

regulatory_basis.rationale: Risk data must be complete and capture all material exposures
Accurate RWA calculation requires complete and valid input data

required_evidence.description: Data quality validation report for each calculation run

acceptance_criteria.description: All required fields are present in input data
Input data passes Pandera schema validation

test_obligations.description: Schema validation tests for all input data types

implementation_hints.description: Use Pandera for DataFrame schema validation

anti_patterns.description: Silently ignoring missing or invalid data
anti_patterns.risk: Incomplete data leads to incorrect RWA calculations
anti_patterns.alternative: Raise validation errors and log data quality issues
